hits.title: Feature request: dark mode
hits.story_text: Please add dark mode to the widget editor.

hits.title: No way to export widget data
hits.story_text: There is no way to export the data currently. Frustrating.

hits.title: Widget keeps crashing
hits.story_text: It keeps breaking on large files, so frustrating to work with.

hits.title: Great widget overall
hits.story_text: I really like using this widget, it works well for me.
